oracleProblems.title: Personalization Depth vs Privacy
oracleProblems.recommendedResolution: Add opt-out and Clear History button to personalization feed

oracleProblems.title: Brand Storytelling vs Task Efficiency
oracleProblems.recommendedResolution: Personalized hero (products for returning, brand for new visitors)

oracleProblems.title: Security vs Quality Assurance
oracleProblems.recommendedResolution: Token-based bypass for authenticated testing tools

oracleProblems.title: Membership Conversion vs Browsing Freedom
oracleProblems.recommendedResolution: Show CTA once per session with clear dismissal

criticalIssues: Akamai bot-detection blocks accessibility tools and automated QA
topStrengths: Full-bleed hero with embedded CTA chips
Sticky product info with pop-up size guides

qualityUxCorrelations: Bot-detection blocks both security testing and accessibility validation
Brand storytelling inversely correlates with high-intent conversion efficiency
Personalization depth positively correlates with conversion but inversely with privacy trust
Pagination positively correlates with user control satisfaction
effectiveInterventions: Color-coded stock indicators create transparent urgency
domainSpecificInsights: German market has highest GDPR sensitivity in EU

limitations: Checkout flow inferred from secondary sources
Mobile experience inferred from breakpoint data
